survey.title: Personalize your experience
survey.subtitle: These questions help us configure the system according to your operation.

teamSize.label: How many people handle customer service on your team?

dailyVolume.label: How many support interactions do you handle per day, on average?

channel.label: What is your main support channel?

ai.label: Do you already use artificial intelligence in customer service?

pain.label: What is your biggest pain point in customer service today?

crm.label: Have you ever used a CRM or customer service system?
options: Used one, but it was difficult

goal.label: What is your main goal with Arco CRM?

survey.footer: Takes less than 1 minute · You can change this later in settings

createAccount.title: Welcome!
createAccount.subtitle: To start using the system, you need to create your first organization.

errors.minLength: Organization name must be at least 2 characters
Name must be at least 2 characters

email.label: Email
email.helper: This is the email used to create your account

support_email.label: Support Email
support_email.helper: This is the support email for your account

errors.invalid: Support email must be a valid email address

success.title: Organization created successfully!
success.description: Your account has been created and you can now start using the system.

createAccount.footer: By creating an organization, you become its administrator and can add other users later.
